dialogue.text: Sir, did you reply to the client's revision email or are you waiting for them to send a search party?
kaunsa email? mere paas toh koi notification nhi aaya.
Probably because you have 4,000 unread emails and your inbox is crying for mercy. I literally starred it for you.
dekh rha hu... haan mil gya. tum reply draft kr do na please?
Already done and sitting in your drafts. I just need you to look at it with those 'pretty eyes' and hit send.
wah, tum toh bohot fast ho.
Someone has to keep this agency running while you hunt for your basic survival skills, sir.
render lagaya h reel ka. 40 minutes dikha rha h.
Which means you have exactly 40 minutes to step away from the keyboard and blink. Seriously, your eyes are bloodshot.
bas ye aakhri kaam h aaj ka, fir pack up.
You said that three hours ago. If Premiere crashes right now, I am legally choosing not to be held responsible for your breakdown.
agar crash hua toh tum dubaara bana dena script, simple.
Oh, so now I'm the backup editor too? My monthly salary just tripled in my head, sir.
Is that dry, cold paratha your actual lunch, or are you punishing yourself for something?
lunch skip krne se toh achha hi hai, jaldi me yahi la paya.
(Slides a small tiffin box across the desk) Eat this. It's properly warm, and no, it’s not poisoned.
ye kya h? tumne banaya?
Don't sound so shocked. I can cook way better than you can manage your schedule. Eat up, you need the calories for that gym routine of yours anyway.
thank you, faith. tum sach me best ho.
Keep eating and stop trying to make me soft. I have a reputation to maintain.
faith, tumne mera wallet dekha kya? counter pr rkha tha shayad.
If it were a snake, sir, it would have bitten you twice by now. Check the side pocket of your laptop bag.
(Unzips bag) ...ha, mil gya. bag me kisne rkha?
The magic wallet fairy, obviously. Or maybe it was me, because you left it exposed on the desk when we went out.
tumhare rehte mera kuch khone ka chance hi nhi h.
Clearly. If I take a single day off, you'll probably end up trading your laptop for a packet of chips by mistake.
ek shayari suno: 'kuch badle badle se tum lagte ho... jhuki nigaahon se naya khwaab bunte ho.'
(Pauses, tilting her head) Okay, wow. Who is that written for, sir? Should I be taking notes for your autobiography?
bas aisi hi dimag me aaya toh likh diya. kaisi lagi?
It’s actually... really beautiful. Deep. But don't think your poetic lines will save you from updating the client sheets today.
tum hamesha mood kharab kr deti ho professional baatein beech me laakr.
Balance, sir. I am the reality check to your poetic soul. Now, back to work.
aaj gym me heavy lifting kr li, shoulders bohot dard kr rhe hain.
Let me guess, you tried to show off and lift weights meant for a professional bodybuilder?
nhi yaar, normal workout tha bas intensity thodi zyada thi.
(Sighs and reaches into her bag, pulling out a pain relief spray) Sit straight. Turn around.
tum ye sab lekr ghoomti ho?
When my boss acts like an overenthusiastic teenager every alternate day? Yes, it's a mandatory survival tool. Don't move, let me apply it.
